items.title: Stock markets fall on tech plunge and renewed Middle East attacks
items.summary: Markets in Europe and Asia were hit by a tech sell-off, and oil rises as Iran and Israel launch attacks on each other.

items.title: Endangered California Condor Flies into Oregon for the First Time in 122 Years
items.summary: Last month, a California condor flew into Oregon before returning after several hundred miles to its home in Redwoods National Park, becoming the first condor recorded in the state since 1904. Taking…
